content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty 50 down 0.66% led by sharp IT sell-off (-4.94%), but clear defensive rotation into FMCG (Nestle, HUL +7-9%), Energy, Power, and PSU Banks. VIX elevated at 18.25 (+4%). Market is bifurcated — strong momentum in select sectors alongside IT carnage. Prefer to ride the rotation themes (FMCG, Power, PSU Banks) while keeping existing positions tight given extended moves.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24350,
      "nifty_resistance": 24550
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not hit within 10 trading days or if price closes below 76.50. Book partial at 85.",
      "reasoning": "Q4 blowout (PAT +35% YoY, GNPA 1.45%, NNPA 0.13%) validates thesis. Stock broke 52-week high at 82.15 with 2.4x volume, VWAP 81.31 holding as intraday support. PSU Bank sector rallying. SL set at 76.50 (~6% below CMP, just below recent breakout zone ~75.54 close of Apr 20). Target 88 offers 1.4:1 R/R from current. Trade at slight unrealized loss but thesis fully intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 948.00,
      "new_target": 1075.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not hit in 10 days or on close below 948. Trail SL to 975 if price closes above 1020.",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat estimates by ~14%, GNPA below 1% milestone, FY26 PAT record Rs 2,291 cr. Stock gapped up 8.8%, hit 1001 intraday (round-number resistance). MOFSL target Rs 1,143, JPM OW Rs 1,000. SL at 948 (~4% below CMP, above breakout support ~923). Target 1075 (between JPM and MOFSL). 1.8:1 R/R."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.50,
      "new_target": 132.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "time_exit_plan": "Hold as defensive hedge; exit if gold trend clearly breaks or SL hit. VIX at 18+ supports hold.",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge holding up with slight positive. India VIX elevated, geopolitical uncertainty (US-Iran ceasefire expiry today), Goldman targets $5,400/oz. SMA50 at 126.37 is near-term resistance. SL at 121.50 below SMA20 (121.92) and recent support. Target 132 (modest ~5% upside)."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 36,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1650.00,
      "stop_loss": 1578.00,
      "target": 1770.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit if target not hit in 10 trading days or on daily close below 1578. Trail SL to 1620 if price crosses 1700.",
      "reasoning": "Breaking out above 52-week high 1640 on 2.3x volume. Power sector structural tailwind: heatwave driving peak demand 275-285 GW, +8-12% YoY. CCI approved Nabha acquisition. Strong chart — 15 consecutive sessions of higher lows. SL at 1578 (~4.4%) below prior day's high. Target 1770 (7.3% upside). R/R 1.7:1. Position size ~Rs 59,400 = 5.9% of capital, conservative due to extended move."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 56,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1047.00,
      "stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.66,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "time_exit_plan": "Hold through Apr 27 board meeting (Q4 results + dividend + fund-raise). Exit on close below 1005 or after results if reaction is negative. Book partial at 1100.",
      "reasoning": "Broke 52-week high (1039) on banking rally. Q4 business update already strong: advances +25.1%, deposits +22.8%. Board meeting Apr 27 is binary catalyst — near-term event risk but strong setup going in. SL at 1005 below breakout zone. Target 1135 (8.4% upside). R/R 2.1:1. Size ~Rs 58,600 = 5.9% of capital."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 was blowout (+27% PAT, +23% revenue), stock gapped +9.5% to 52-week high. Setup is strong but chasing after an extended gap is poor R/R. Prefer to wait for pullback to ~1360-1380 (near VWAP) before entering. Watchlist only."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 7.28% on read-across from Nestle but HUL's own Q4 is on Apr 30 — chronic slow-volume growth (3.5% Q3) is the key risk. Wait for actual Q4 print before committing. Nestle exposure via more directly would be preferable."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DEEPAKNTR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 12% without clear company-specific catalyst; P/E 38x is stretched, margin compression persists. Chasing a sector-wide chemical rally with no specific edge. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GAIL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 5.45% but sector analysts see only market-aligned returns for GAIL. Pipeline delay (KKBMPL to Sep 2026) and heavy solar capex dilute ROCE. Rally without strong catalyst — pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ELECON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.30,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 10% despite Q4 PAT -96% due to goodwill impairment. MarketsMojo downgraded to Strong Sell. Rally looks like speculation against fundamentals. AVOID."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "AUROPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.52,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Near 52-week high, decent setup but volume is only 0.4x — lacks conviction. Prefer GRANULES in pharma where volume is 3.7x and Q4 results on Apr 29 are a defined catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Attractive setup — 3.7x volume, near 52-week high, FDA Chantilly clean outcome, Q4 on Apr 29. However, already running positions and want to preserve capital buffer today. Will revisit closer to Apr 29 if price consolidates above 670."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ZENTEC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 7.6% on big volume from order wins, but MOFSL target Rs 1,400 is BELOW CMP 1768, FY26 revenue expected to contract ~35%. Rally looks overdone vs fundamentals. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Shooting star candle on Apr 20 at top of run (+5.68% today, but closed well off high 214.84). Extended — up from 150 to 212 in 3 weeks. Prefer TORNTPOWER for power sector exposure with cleaner chart."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HCLTECH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 10% post-Q4 to 52-week low, CC revenue -3.3% QoQ, margin -200bps, FY27 guidance 2-5% CC muted. Catching falling knife in worst-performing sector. Wait for stabilization. TECHM results later today could bring more downside."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 76.50,
      "reasoning": "Thesis fully intact post Q4 blowout. Setting SL at 76.50 (below breakout zone) per MODIFY decision."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 948.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat + breakout above 1000. Hold with SL at 948 locking in small gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.50,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge given elevated VIX and geopolitical risk. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "GRANULES — revisit if consolidates above 670 heading into Apr 29 results. NESTLEIND — watch for pullback to 1370-1380 zone for swing entry. AUBANK post-Apr 27 results could offer follow-through if FY26 numbers confirm business update. HCLTECH — track for stabilization base; not actionable now.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 3 — deploying capital gradually. After new adds (TORNTPOWER, AUBANK), deployed capital will rise to ~34% of portfolio, well within limits. Sector diversification: PSU Bank (MAHABANK), Financial Services (PNBHOUSING), Commodity hedge (GOLDBEES), Power (TORNTPOWER), Private Banking (AUBANK). Watching IT sector bloodbath — avoiding exposure. VIX at 18+ warrants tight SLs on all positions."
}
